children.heading: Submission to Secretary
children.label: a Submission to Secretary
children.text: Each proposal for an agricultural research facility shall be submitted to the Secretary for review. The Secretary shall review the proposals in the order in which the proposals are received.

children.heading: Application process
children.label: b Application process
children.text: In consultation with the congressional agriculture committees, the Secretary shall establish an application process for the submission of proposals for agricultural research facilities.

children.heading: Determination by Secretary
children.label: 1 Determination by Secretary
children.text: With respect to each proposal for an agricultural research facility submitted under subsection (a), the Secretary shall determine whether the proposal meets the criteria set forth in paragraph (2).

children.heading: Non-Federal share
children.label: A Non-Federal share
children.text: The proposal shall certify the availability of at least a 50 percent non-Federal share of the cost of the facility. The non-Federal share shall be paid in cash and may include funding from private sources or from units of State or local government.

children.heading: Nonduplication of facilities
children.label: B Nonduplication of facilities
children.text: The proposal shall demonstrate how the agricultural research facility would be complementary to, and not duplicative of, facilities of colleges, universities, and nonprofit institutions, and facilities of the Agricultural Research Service, within the State and region.

children.label: i
children.text: 1 or more of the national research policies and priorities set forth in ; andsection 3101 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the agricultural research facility after the facility is completed; and

children.label: ii
children.text: each program to be based at the facility.
evaluate and assess the merits of the proposal, including the extent to which the proposal meets the criteria set forth in subsection (c); and
report to the congressional agriculture committees on the results of the evaluation and assessment.

children.heading: National or multistate needs served by ARS facilities
children.label: e National or multistate needs served by ARS facilities
children.text: The Secretary shall ensure that each research activity conducted by a facility of the Agricultural Research Service serves a national or multistate need.
